title: Crib Point
content:
Roof Restoration Crib Point

Professional Roof Restoration & Gutter Repairs in Crib Point. Sandhurst Roofing are proud to offer the people of Crib Point, with high quality and expert roofing services. No job is too big or too small for our team of expert tradespeople –  every person on our team are registered roof tilers and roof plumbers.

We’re one of the leading roof repair and restoration, gutter repair and installation providers in Crib Point, and across Melbourne. We’re also experienced working with many different products and materials like terracotta tiles, Colorbond roofing, flat metal roofing and cement tiles. You’re next roofing job is safe in Sandhurst Roofing’s capable hands.

Get a Quote!

Offering Honest & Reliable Roof Repairs in Crib Point

We’re proud to provide high quality roof repairs and restorations to the people of Crib Point.

Since Sandhurst Roofing opened over 30 years ago, we’ve become one of Melbourne’s leading roofing companies. Our team pride themselves on giving people honest advice, every step of the way to make sure they feel comfortable with the entire process.

For every job that we undertake, we use industry leading materials, that are durable and long-lasting. That’s why we offer you a 10-year guarantee on our quality workmanship and materials.

Are ready to experience the Sandhurst Roofing difference? It’s time to contact the locals at Sandhurst today.

Get a Quote!

Gutter Repairs Crib Point

At Sandhurst Roofing we understand that maintenance, repair and replacement of your gutters is a crucial part of keeping your roof in good condition. Gutters direct water away from the roof, preventing mould growth, rotting, leaks and much more from ruining the look and structural stability of our roof.

Gutters are often said to be the most important part of your roof; that is why we use COLORBOND® steel, the most durable and reliable product available to us. COLORBOND® steel is not only incredibly durable, and built for all different types of weather conditions, but it is also extremely versatile and has a colour to suit any type of existing property. For more information on our comprehensive roofing and guttering service, call us today on 0448 812 800.

What Our Crib Point Customers Say

Steve was very punctual with coming to assess our roofing situation. He discussed with me every aspect of the job required for the replacement of our very old tin roof.This all happened at a particularly busy time for Steve’s company and he kept me up to date with the preparation of the job. Once it started it was a very slick operation completed within 4 days. I wasn’t there during the day but saw the results of progress each afternoon. They have done a very neat professional job and I am very happy with the result. Steve was a pleasure to deal with. Well done.

Cameron Kennedy-Miller
★★★★★

Our roof looks amazing, we had over 70 cracked tiles, they replaced those and the roof needed re pointing as well as it was flaking and damaged. Due to weather it took a few weeks and to ensure it looked perfect Matty & the team delayed works but kept us in the loop all the time, but it was worth wait. Our roof looks brand new. They clean up of the site afterwards, ensure you happy with that and nothing is too much trouble. Thank you.

Allison Sheean
★★★★★ View All Reviews

Call Today, For Help With Your Repairs and Restorations In Crib Point

Whether you live in Crib Point or surrounding areas like Hastings, Mount Eliza, Langwarrin, Mornington, Frankston, Mount Martha, Carrum Downs or Chelsea, our team of experts will be on hand to solve your roof issues.

If you’re ready to get your roofing project underway? Call Steve today on 0448 812 800 and we’ll provide you with a quote. Alternatively, you can email us at info@sandhurstroofing.com.au and one of our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
